mapper.select: SELECT problem_id, quiz_text, quiz_answer, explanation, created_time, last_modified_time FROM quiz_problem ORDER BY problem_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quiz_problem (quiz_text, quiz_answer, explanation) VALUES (#{quizText}, #{quizAnswer}, #{explanation})
mapper.update: UPDATE quiz_problem SET quiz_text = #{quizText}, quiz_answer = #{quizAnswer}, explanation = #{explanation}, last_modified_time = NOW() WHERE problem_id = #{problemId}
mapper.select: SELECT problem_id, quiz_text, quiz_answer, explanation, created_time, last_modified_time FROM quiz_problem ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 1

SELECT p.problem_id, p.quiz_text, p.quiz_answer, p.explanation, p.created_time, p.last_modified_time FROM quiz_problem p WHERE p.problem_id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT ql.problem_id FROM quiz_log ql WHERE ql.user_id = #{userId} ) ORDER BY p.problem_id

SELECT p.problem_id, p.quiz_text, p.quiz_answer, p.explanation, p.created_time, p.last_modified_time FROM quiz_problem p WHERE p.problem_id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT ql.problem_id FROM quiz_log ql WHERE ql.user_id = #{userId} ) ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quiz_problem p WHERE p.problem_id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT ql.problem_id FROM quiz_log ql WHERE ql.user_id = #{userId} )

SELECT problem_id, quiz_text, quiz_answer, explanation, created_time, last_modified_time FROM quiz_problem WHERE problem_id IN
#{id}
